reviews.review_description:
Okay I'm going to be honest, when I first got this game I hated it. I thought the graphics were simple, waving to people to interact with them was dumb and I put it on the back burner for some time. My mistake and I want to apologize to the Devs for not giving it the proper chance the first time around. I came back into it a month ago and saw that there was now a co-op mode so, I gave it another go. And Geeeezus, this has got to be one of the best immersive games I have ever played, I mean right up there next to Skyrim VR that's been heavily modded. The weather, the hunting and just all over survival is AMAZING.
I love the bow hunting aspect, having to make dinner for myself and waking up in my small home to see the mountain just past the river from my window. 
The people, if they are your age are great, the screaming kids are just part of vr life but hosting a game I can control that. Others are there for the same immersive experience and that really makes it fun. The building is tedious but very rewarding. A lot of resources are needed but when you grab that Deed and it pops, such a great feeling.
I love how the seasons change, I woke up to freaking snow on the ground and had to completely replan my day because of it. I found that hunting is challenging when I ran into my first boar. Little B#@T@#$. 
With that said, I wish there was more music added to this. It always seems to be the same and during something intense, it's hard to feel that with happy town music playing. I like it I just wish there were more differences to listen too.
OVER ALL: Get this game, and play it. Don't do what I did and dismiss it on first glance. 
Devs I can't wait to see what else there is to this game and once again I sincerely apologize for writing it off too early.

reviews.review_title: Best Survival Game on the Quest 3
reviews.review_description:
This is the best survival game I've played on the Quest 3. The only game that comes close is Surviving Mars Pioneer, but that one is completed and has no updates on the horizon. The "village" building, farming, cooking, hunting, and grinding with endless "base-building" possibilities where you lose track of time is what immersion into VR is all about. 

The studio isn't working on anymore updates for this either, but it's packed with so much to do that it isn't the same game twice. If you like to play games with all of those elements of survival (without dying every 30 minutes *Green Hell*) then this game is a must have.

This game is genuinely amazing! I first found this game after over a year of hoping for a game as interactive and elaborate as this and i finally found it. I started playing with a friend on cooperative and there are a few lag spikes here and there but that's to be expected with all the different parts of the game. The lag spikes always end up resolving themselves and it doesn't influence our enjoyment of the game. Recently i have started playing with my brothers and boyfriend as well because i want them to love this game as much as I do and they are also obsessed with it. 
I love this game so much and have spent close to 24 hours in total playing in the 3 days I've had this game. The only critique i have for this game is just that i wish there were ridable mounts in this game like in the console game. I know that that might be too much to ask for but over all I love this! It's awesome and even the little weird bugs here and there are enjoyable and give me, my friends and my family a laugh. 
Absolutely obsessed with this game!

There's a bunch of VR games out there, and this one, is something else.
When I first tried this game I thought it was gonna be mid, but boy I was wrong. I played this game with my best friend and there is so much to do. it reminded us when we played Minecraft back in the day. This game has SO MUCH potential. This game could be a top ten for VR. I absolutely love EVERYTHING in this game. Try out this game with at least with one friend, you wont be disappointed
Final Rating 9.4/10

reviews.review_title: My game save data is gone.
reviews.review_description:
My sub-account’s game save data has completely disappeared. We spent a long time working on it together, and now all that progress is gone. Who can I contact for assistance?
==========
So I sent you two emails asking for help, and up until now I still haven’t received any reply. Does this mean you simply don’t care about the problems players are experiencing?

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We're sorry that you're having issues with your save files. Did you try to recover them through the 'cloud backup'? https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/
Feel free to contact us on bugs@spectralgames.com for further assistance :)

reviews.review_title: Good if you’re 70 years old rofl
reviews.review_description:
This game is “good enough” for either single moms or old people who wanna roleplay medieval and dont care about the pathetic physics and lack of features.

The animals are beyond stupid, you cant even grab or touch them, nor interact properly with the world.

If you are looking for realism and immersion, skip this.
Played through on solo, then they added coop. So i bought it for my wife, now its even more fun
Thats all the things in one game that i wished for though im 35y old but im addicted to this game. Thanks
just started today and it is a wonderful game so i think you should play

reviews.review_title: Sitting accessibility can be a problem.
reviews.review_description: Couldn't chop trees or pick up water during the Tutorial. Also needs more guide to the next NPC.
i'm literally addicted to this game anytime anytime my quest is charged i make sure to play it
Such a good game I play for hours every day

I have had a quest 3 for nearly two years and played alot of great games but I think this might be my favourite. The graphics are being pushed to the limit on a stand alone headset and can occasionally glitch for a second or two. I still haven't finished the solo adventure but I can confidently recommend it to anyone wanting a crafting/survival light RPG. The sound is excellent and some of the music is wonderful. The crafting and interactions are cleverly designed to be somewhat realistic but also just fun, such as skinning animals. Just preparing food is cleverly thought out, with little touches like the knife always returning to the same position when you let go so you don't lose it. As for hunting, I turned the bow sight off to make it more realistic and I think it's perfect now. I have been impressed by the missions too, they can be quite tense, especially the night ones. Love the torch too, the lighting is impressive. Overall it's just taken over my vr gaming recently and I love it. In the words of the NPCs, "Take care".
I've only played this game for a few hours, but I'm loving it so far. :)

It wasn’t loading for like a full five hours and beginning it just kept saying medieval has stopped and then it finally worked and I played it for a couple hours and I really liked it so I thought it was fixed right and then I came back to play it and now it’s doing the same thing and it’s really pissing me off. And it still isn’t loading.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Can you please reach out to us through our email bugs@spectralgames.com or discord spectralgames.com/Discord ?
We've released our fix yesteraday and most affected players already confirmed that the game is now working properly but if you're still stuck in loading please message us so that we can work it out with your particular case - by sending a save file with our instructions or troubleshooting the issue more. We're sorry for the inconvenience!

reviews.review_description: I'm a huge fan of the dynasty series for the longest time, so I was pleasantly suprised to discover MD on VR. I must say I had tons of fun! Thanks to the devs and team for making an enjoyable game!
I love this game. It's all I ever play anymore. Good job developers!
Really enjoying stepping into this world for a short respite.

reviews.review_title: just started but so far so good!
reviews.review_description: good graphics & storyline!
this game is rather very relaxing and knows how to bring a person down from a bad day
Just amasing
.very fun worth it
I like it

reviews.review_title: Can yall pls add this stuff
reviews.review_description: I love this game I was not going to play this game cuz of the way it looked but I like medieval stuff like a lot so I gave it a chance and I love this game now it's up there for my favorite VR games I would like y'all to add more job building and more jobs for your villagers and add were u can dig up them small hills like the ones in crossroads and that big one in the middle and for u to flatten land and can y'all add where u can get better backpacks that have more space ik it goes to 150 but can y'all maybe add backpack that go to 200 and one to 250 and can y'all maybe add more legendary animals

reviews.review_title: Solid but not quite like console
reviews.review_description: I just dislike that i cant make a dynasty ykwm and there's no like skill tree and stuff

developer_response.body: Hi there! You totally can both have a dynasty and skill tree :D You can romance people from the worker camp near Wolfhill (only in singleplayer modes) and you have a whole dynasty skill tree in the dynasty book wher eyou can upgrade your character using dynasty points. This is also in solo, co-op has just the section with skills you progress by doing stuff around your settlement ;)

reviews.review_description: Great game
Peak

Right from the get go this game is hands down my favourite experience on the quest! Many times I've heard the phrase "full immersion" but at my age (I'm old!) I should not want to actually live in a virtual world 😂
Highly recommended to anyone who likes this type of game, if you get this you will NOT be disappointed! Wonderful job and hats off to the devs.

reviews.review_title: We need Traditional Chinese language sup
reviews.review_description: The gameplay is very enjoyable, but we require Traditional Chinese language support. With AI technology available now, could your game developers implement Traditional Chinese language support?

reviews.review_title: One of the Must Own Quest Titles
reviews.review_description: Do you want to chop down trees, raise bees, and enjoy a multi generational adventure that allows you to build a medieval village from the ground up? You've got all that right here. A must own for anyone that wants to explore and build.

reviews.review_title: wat it is what it is  very beautiful vr
reviews.review_description:
Crimson dynasty 
10000000000000. Recommended!!!
Good game
I love games like this. The graphics are great. Gameplay is smooth and fun. This is my favorite VR game hands down

Yeah so fishing is completely broken. Nothing works. I looked it up, watched 10 tutorials all saying the exact same thing, when i go to do it the square doesn’t even move a cm. Also i’ve been playing cooperative mode for a week now, have all the requirements to get villagers and can find absolutely no one to move in. I’ve got extra houses, a resource area, with food and water in it, a well, all the amenities, 450 dynasty rep. Haven’t found a single person sitting by the campfires a single time, and never even seen the mention of someone being able to move in or even work for me. This just makes it a crappy survival sim but you can’t even fish. Broken game, not worth a fraction of what the pc game is

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We're sorry for the frustration - fishing should work just fine, including co-op mode, so if it's still not enabling even tho you follow the exact steps as seen on the gif in-game (can be rewatched in encyclopedia) please reach out to us with a video through bugs@spectralgames.com so we can give you better guidance!
As for workers - they're not available at all in the co-op mode, as stated in the infobox containig information about each mode. Sorry for the confusion!

reviews.review_title: Great Game, But I Want more Animals.
reviews.review_description: I have really enjoyed this game and I have not discovered all the animals yet do I have no clue of whether these are in the game or not, but if they aren’t, please add Eurasian Elk (Moose),Capercaillie and other poultry birds like Grouse and Eurasian Lynx. I have taken that the game is set in Eastern to Central Europe based on the usage of Wisent in the game. They are known as Bison in North America. I would love this new addition if not already in and I would really love like a book where you can see what animals live in Green Valley. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you for all the suggestions! You can find informations on all the animals living in the Green Valley in the encyclopedia available from the pause menu :D

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, but I feel like it would be better if you could add cows or sheep maybe and horses those are my suggestions. Never mind I though I was a genius I just realized it’s in the actual pc/ Xbox but not on vr
Good game

One of the most immersive games in VR thanks to the physical interactions. Each activity requires real  movement - for example if you want to cook you need to cut the ingredients yourself and light the fire beneath the pot before stirring. And everything is like that: fishing, baking, pottery etc. That's what I love about this game - you need to do everything yourself, and that's always fun in VR.

reviews.review_title: Why do the NPCs sleep w/their eyes open
reviews.review_description: Love exploring a waterfall when I spot a bear in the distance. The sky begins to turn dark and lightning strikes. Best to take the path away from the bear but bam another bear around the corner and I'm diving off cliff sides to escape. Back at my humble home I start a fire and listen to the rain as I plan my next outing. Hope for future maps and graphic enhancements as times go on.

I love all medieval stuff and this game is fantastic 
￼

developer_response.body: Thank you, we're really glad to hear that you're enhjoying your life in the valley!

reviews.review_description: It's fun playing solo but amazing playing coOp...only problem is very little quests and not nearly as much excitement as the individual play!  Any updates in the works??
This game has everything I'm looking for! Action, Quests, Crafting, and so much more! I'm hooked!
For me who's playing on a 3s i think the game is buggy and i would want better graphics for the game that's the only reason i don't feel immersed
Coop carries this game the story mode is fine but coop is what is fun in this game. Overall a really good game.

There's a lot of potential. Controls need adjusting. Picking items up through floors is annoying, such as whatever grows under youor home near your storage chest. Item durability is far too low at first. I get that speed suffers with better graphics, but it could use some polish.
i'm having fun playing different parts of the game, the solo campaign is lengthy and fun. having fun molding my character into How i think a person  might reflect treats in medieval era.

My wife and I just had our second co-op session and are loving it. It’s definitely a little rough around the edges and we had to start over after our first session didn’t save the second players progress, but it was explicit from the beginning about it being in a beta-phase. We really want to encourage the devs to keep going with this. It’s awesome having a game that is not combat focused and played with friends. For us, this is what we want to see more of in VR. There’s a lot to explore and learn and we look forward to playing more!

reviews.review_title: Good. The original was better though
reviews.review_description: i really like the original game and i was expecting it to just be the virtual reality version of the original flat screen game. it's not but i wish it was
I don't know how to explain the feeling but something about this with friends is so fun
I absolutely love this game! so for new future updates!!
Yeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeet yes its good of my...

reviews.review_title: Awesome game with a few problems
reviews.review_description: I love this game so much. It’s an amazing experience. However, there are some things i would like to see added. I wish that you had a setting to turn bandits off because some people don’t like the violence. I also wish that there was more physics with things like chopping trees etc. the spear is also really glitchy, so I wish that were fixed. Overall great game also I experience a bug in coop sometimes where I can’t see the other player but they can see me and I can’t only see their backpack when the hold it as well as any items they have
I love this game and i don't regret buying it and its very calm if you have enough suplies to build things and i just really like this game but a lil bit buggy on a few hit boxes but thaats alright.

This became my favorite game for VR. The co-op is a great feature and you can make a private instance to play with friends so there is no forced PvP like in Elder Ring or anything like that. The graphics are beautiful and remind me a bit of classic PlayStation and PC games from circa 2010, but the VR mechanics add to the Immersion of gaming ( you literally shake the hand of merchants to set a deal). Overall love it.

reviews.review_title: Love it but I would like more control
reviews.review_description:
I've been immersed in this game for a couple of weeks.  It seems like I drop my headset down over my eyes to play and when I lift it off, hours have passed.  I look forward to my next session. 

I've finished the solo dynasty quest so I'm just building  up my village at this point.  The replayability has gone down a bit.  I hope they come out with new quests or maybe get the opportunity to discover and inhabit a new area.  

I would like to have more control over my workers. I would like the option to task them to different jobs within their area, especially in the tavern. My worker uses up all my flour to make loaves of bread.  I would like to be able to modify what they cook or even see them serve some of the customers.  I'm sure there's still a bit for me to learn.  

There have been a couple of bugs in the game. My headset will freeze for a few seconds from time to time and stirring the cooking pot can be a little awkward because the spoon gets stuck. Overall, I really enjoyed the game and hope to see more in the future. I still need to try the co-op mode
Love it cant wait for more!!

reviews.review_title: This is the one thing that needs fixing!
reviews.review_description: I'm Japanese and I'm using a translation machine to write this review.This is a good game, but the Japanese is terrible.Japanese language by volunteers We would like to request that volunteers add a Japanese translation.

its a good game but... The bugs make me not Want to play. When i use the book it thinks i am pressing a recipe when I'm nit I've lost some soup to it and its anoyying but aside from that its a good game

At first i did not know what i was doing and im not gonna lie i died twice but after only two hours i got a fishing rod and found a bow still not sure how to make the bows even after now having more than 48 hours of game play but all in all great and amazing game 10/10 would segjest to new players

developer_response.body: Hi, really glad to hear that! Bows can be crafted in player's hunting lodge - recipe for that building is available from day 1 on sandbox and co-op, in adventure mode you unlock it through completing quests with local hunter Mściwór somewhere in the first couple of hours in the main storyline ;)

reviews.review_description:
I am also a big fan of the flats screen version, so when this became available for preorder, I jumped in feet first!

Initially, I am impressed a lot, and I can't wait to spend time in game. 

One point for the Devs, can you add the crafting of pathways? The flat screen has it and it makes the setting up your village alot better.

Very excited to see this game develop further!

This is the best survival vr game I’ve ever played. My review was originally four stars, because multiplayer hadn’t been implemented yet. But now, the game is perfect. The only things missing are some of the singeplayer features that didn’t make it into multiplayer, but other than that, love this game.

One of the best vr survival games I've played. The graphics are really clean. Instead of snow looking like little white dots falling from the sky, they actually look like snowflakes. I love how tradeskills are tide into quests and the storyline they follow. Gameplay is smooth which make the openworld play really enjoyable. Of all the survival games I've played this is one of my favorites.

It is a good game and I like how you can get the game on horizon+. it is a good survival game and co op is good for players who want to play with their friends but it would be better if you could have freedom at the start instead of doing the starter quests and would be good if they was fish in the game everything else I am happy with. I would recommend getting the game if you like survival games

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for sharing your feedback! If you choose sandbox mode you do have freedom from the very start :D same for fishing - available from day 1. Only fishing rod recipe is 'locked' behind the something fishy quest chain, available from day 1 ok sandbox - fishing can be a bit complicated so we wanted to make sure everyone learn it through the quest. But if you want to give fishing a try immediately simply collect a fishing rod from one of the decorative spots near the river (one is by the fishing camp, other by the long bridge in the south) so that you can fish even before that quest!

so good and easy to play and lern
Cool game and cheap bundles

Have been enjoying the game

My brother and I have played many coops together and got this todsy and both enjoy
 it,

Like so many games released, it's a good premise but glitchy and janky.  When your gameplay experience gets in the way of playing the game it's going to color people's opinion.

Plays like an early access game and multiplayer is riddled with minor issues.  As usual people have overhyped its rating.

Developers need to stop releasing VR games that have significant hitches and issues running smoothly, VR isn't a fun way to experience those sorts of issues.
